details:
Clear dependency confusion / typosquatting against non-PyPI packages without any code inside. Target: the package that either existed earlier in PyPI or is available only in some mirrors, e.g.: https://github.com/YuchenFan48/slime/blob/cf2012f1505d8f6c35bf0af8254dfc3c61c58ef2/scripts/run-qwen3-next-h.sh#L66


---

Category: SPAM - advertisements, spam packages etc.


Campaign: GENERIC-empty-dependency-confusion


Reasons (based on the campaign):


 - dependency-confusion


 - typosquatting
